allow: Bash(node -e "const {World} = require\('./server/world'\); const w = new World\(\); console.log\('World OK:', Object.keys\(w\).join\(', '\)\)")

Bash(node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\); let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const r=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('register:', r.success, '| id:', r.agent && r.agent.id\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\); let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const r=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('speak:', r.success, '| context msgs:', r.conversationContext && r.conversationContext.messages.length\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\); let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const s=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('agents:', Object.keys\(s.agents\).length, '| events:', s.eventLog.length\); }\)" kill %1 echo "Server test done.")

Bash(node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\);let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const s=JSON.parse\(d\);console.log\('Active agents after reset:', Object.values\(s.agents\).filter\(a=>a.active\).map\(a=>a.name\).join\(','\)\);}\)" kill %1 echo "All tests passed.")
